'''gobavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atas|atas]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atas|atas]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gobavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gobavithi|gobavithi]] || [[word:gobaviji|gobaviji]] || [[word:gobavishi|gobavishi]] || [[word:gobaviki|gobaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gobavuthuthu|gobavuthuthu]] || [[word:gobavujuju|gobavujuju]] || [[word:gobavushushu|gobavushushu]] || [[word:gobavukuku|gobavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gobavuthu|gobavuthu]] || [[word:gobavuju|gobavuju]] || [[word:gobavushu|gobavushu]] || [[word:gobavuku|gobavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gobavufthuf|gobavufthuf]] || [[word:gobavufjuf|gobavufjuf]] || [[word:gobavufshuf|gobavufshuf]] || [[word:gobavufkuf|gobavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gobavethe|gobavethe]] || [[word:gobaveje|gobaveje]] || [[word:gobaveshe|gobaveshe]] || [[word:gobaveke|gobaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gobavothotho|gobavothotho]] || [[word:gobavojojo|gobavojojo]] || [[word:gobavoshosho|gobavoshosho]] || [[word:gobavokoko|gobavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gobavotho|gobavotho]] || [[word:gobavojo|gobavojo]] || [[word:gobavosho|gobavosho]] || [[word:gobavoko|gobavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gobavofthof|gobavofthof]] || [[word:gobavofjof|gobavofjof]] || [[word:gobavofshof|gobavofshof]] || [[word:gobavofkof|gobavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfthĂŻf|gobavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfjĂŻf|gobavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfshĂŻf|gobavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfkĂŻf|gobavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|gobavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|gobavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|gobavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|gobavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfthĂŻf|gobavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfjĂŻf|gobavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfshĂŻf|gobavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfkĂŻf|gobavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfthĂŻf|gobavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfjĂŻf|gobavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfshĂŻf|gobavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gobavĂŻfkĂŻf|gobavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gobavĂŠthĂŠ|gobavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gobavĂŠjĂŠ|gobavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gobavĂŠshĂŠ|gobavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gobavĂŠkĂŠ|gobavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gobavathatha|gobavathatha]] || [[word:gobavajaja|gobavajaja]] || [[word:gobavashasha|gobavashasha]] || [[word:gobavakaka|gobavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gobavatha|gobavatha]] || [[word:gobavaja|gobavaja]] || [[word:gobavasha|gobavasha]] || [[word:gobavaka|gobavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gobavafthaf|gobavafthaf]] || [[word:gobavafjaf|gobavafjaf]] || [[word:gobavafshaf|gobavafshaf]] || [[word:gobavafkaf|gobavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gobavasha|gobavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gobavshĂ«sha|gobavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobavrosha|gobavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobavmusha|gobavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobavyasha|gobavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogobavnkshĂ«sha|gogobavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogobavnkrosha|gogobavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogobavnkmusha|gogobavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogobavnkyasha|gogobavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gobabavasha|gobabavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gobabavshĂ«sha|gobabavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobabavrosha|gobabavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobabavmusha|gobabavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobabavyasha|gobabavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogobabavnkshĂ«sha|gogobabavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogobabavnkrosha|gogobabavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogobabavnkmusha|gogobabavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogobabavnkyasha|gogobabavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gebĂŠvasha|gebĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gebĂŠvshĂ«sha|gebĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gebĂŠvrosha|gebĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gebĂŠvmusha|gebĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gebĂŠvyasha|gebĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogebĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|gogebĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogebĂŠvnkrosha|gogebĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogebĂŠvnkmusha|gogebĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogebĂŠvnkyasha|gogebĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gobfavasha|gobfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gobfavshĂ«sha|gobfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobfavrosha|gobfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobfavmusha|gobfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobfavyasha|gobfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogobfavnkshĂ«sha|gogobfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogobfavnkrosha|gogobfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogobfavnkmusha|gogobfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogobfavnkyasha|gogobfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
